title: coreopsis senifolia var. stellata
intro: Coreopsis senifolia var. stellata, also known as the Stellate Coreopsis, is a perennial flowering plant native to North America. The plant is believed to have medicinal properties, particularly in its use as a diuretic and a treatment for various kidney and urinary issues. The health benefits of Coreopsis senifolia var. stellata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as a natural antiseptic. It can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, decoctions, and salves, although more research is needed to fully understand its medicinal applications.
